query:
-- Create missing assignments for all service-matched items
INSERT INTO service_billing_assignments (billingItemExternalId, serviceExternalId, customerExternalId, assignedBy, assignmentMethod, assignmentBucket)
SELECT 
  bi.externalId,
  bi.serviceExternalId,
  bi.customerExternalId,
  'system-auto',
  'auto',
  'standard'
FROM billing_items bi
LEFT JOIN service_billing_assignments sba ON sba.billingItemExternalId = bi.externalId
WHERE bi.matchStatus IN ('matched', 'service-matched')
  AND bi.serviceExternalId IS NOT NULL AND bi.serviceExternalId != ''
  AND sba.id IS NULL;
